header:
<js>
 let defaultVariable = {
 	    "source": {
 	    	    "tab": 1,
 	    	    "mode": "📖小说",
 	    	    "source": "番茄小说"
 	    	},
 	    	"studio": {
 	    		    "num": "",
 	    		    "toneId": "",
 	    		    "toneName": ""
 	    		},
 	    		"version": version,
 	    		"Cookie": cookie.getKey("fanqienovel.com", "sessionid")||"",
 	    		"progress": false,
 	    		"apiIndex": 0,
 	    		"register": false,
 	    		"bookshelfSync": false,
 	    		"bookComment": false,
 	    		"lastSyncProgressTime": Date.now(),
 	    		"bookshelf": [
 	    		    {
 	    		    	    "bookId": "" 
 	    		    	}
 	    		 ]
 	}
 let variable = source.getVariable();
 if(variable != "" && variable != null){
   try{
      variable = JSON.parse(variable);
   } catch(err) {
     java.log(err);
     variable = defaultVariable;
     source.variable = JSON.stringify(defaultVariable);
     java.toast("请不要自己源变量，已重置源变量！")
   }
 } else {
   variable = defaultVariable;
   java.toast("已进行书源配置初始化！");
   source.variable = JSON.stringify(defaultVariable);
  }
 let Header = {
 	    "Version": version,
 	    "Device": java.androidId(),
 	    "X-Novel-Type": "read.yuedu",
     "Key": source.getLoginInfoMap().get("你的专属Key") || ""
     }
  JSON.stringify(Header)
 </js>

ruleContent.content:
<js>
const bookId = book.bookUrl.match(/bookId\=([0-9]{19})/)[1];
const itemId = java.hexDecodeToString(result);
const variable = JSON.parse(source.getVariable());
const { source: { tab }, apiIndex, bookshelfSync, bookComment, lastSyncProgressTime } = variable;
const toneId = (variable.studio.toneId || "tone_id=1").match(/tone_id\=(\d+)/)[1];

java.log("itemId获取成功：" + itemId);
//register(variable.register);

let url;
switch(tab) {
	   case 1:
	      url = "content.php?item_id=" + itemId;
    break;
    case 2:
        url = "content.php?item_id=" + itemId;
    break;
    case 3:
        let pram = [
            `item_id=${itemId}`,
            `tone_id=${toneId}`
        ].join("&");
        url = "audio.php?" + pram;
    break;
    case 4:
        let prams = [
            `book_id=${bookId}`,
            `item_id=${itemId}`,
            "type=html"
        ].join("&");
        url = "video.php?" + prams;
     break;
}

let ContentUrl = api[apiIndex] + action + url;

//java.log(ContentUrl);

let res;
if(tab != 4 && tab !=1) {
    res = JSON.parse(java.ajax(ContentUrl));
}

if(tab ==1 && variable.progress && Date.now() - lastSyncProgressTime > 30000) {
	  java.log("尝试进行阅读进度同步！");
	  let Cookie = "sessionid=" + cookie.getKey("fanqienovel.com", "sessionid");
	  let body = {
	  	    "book_id": bookId,
	  	    "item_id": itemId,
	  	    "read_progress": 0,
	  	    "index": book.durChapterIndex + 1,
	  	    "read_timestamp": Date.now(),
	  	    "genre_type": 0
	  	}
	  	let Hander = {
	  		   "user-agent": "Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/116.0.0.0 Safari/537.36",
	  		   "cookie": Cookie
	  	}
	  	let opions = JSON.stringify({
	  	    body: body,
	  	    charset: "UTF-8",
	  	    headers: Hander,
	  	    method: "POST"
	  	});
	  	try{
	      	let bdata = java.ajax(reurl + "," + opions);
	      	let rdata = JSON.parse(bdata);
	      	if(rdata["code"] != 0 || !bdata) {
	      		   java.log("阅读进度同步失败！\n" + rdata["message"]);
	      		} else {
	      			  java.log(rdata["message"]);
	      			  variable.lastSyncProgressTime = Date.now();
	      			  source.setVariable(JSON.stringify(variable));
	      		}
	   } catch(er) {
	   	     java.log("阅读进度同步失败！\n" + er);
	   	}
	}

if(tab == 4) {
    if(book.durChapterIndex == chapter.index) {
        java.startBrowser(ContentUrl, chapter.title);
        java.toast('正在加载视频\n视频加载较慢，请耐心等待');
    }
    result = "刷新进入短剧播放";
} else if(tab == 3) {
    result = res.data.content.mainUrl;
} else if(tab == 1) {
	   if(bookComment) {
	   	    let cont = java.connect(ContentUrl).body();
	   	    let cresult = JSON.parse(cont).data.content;
	   	    var html = cresult.match(/<p[^>]*>(.*?)<\/p>/g);
	   	    result = html.map(p => p.replace(/<p[^>]*>|<\/p>/g, '')).join("\n");
	   	    result = setend(result, bookId, itemId);
	   	} else {
	   		   res = JSON.parse(java.ajax(ContentUrl));
	   		   result = getComic(String(res.data.content));
	   	    result.replace(/\{\!\-\- PGC_VOICE\:.*\-\-\}/g, "");
	   	}
} else if(tab == 2) {
	   //java.log(res.data.content);
	   result = getComic(String(res.data.content));
}
	   	    
result
</js>

ruleExplore.author: $.author
ruleExplore.bookList:
<js>

let ck = "sessionid=" + (String(cookie.getKey("fanqienovel.com", "sessionid")) ? String(cookie.getKey("fanqienovel.com", "sessionid")) : (source.getLoginInfoMap() || {})['手动登录Token'])

getShelf = () => {
let book_shelf_url = 'https://fanqienovel.com/reading/bookapi/bookshelf/info/v:version/?aid=1967&iid=0&version_code=57700&update_version_code=57700'
let book_shelf_info = java.ajax(book_shelf_url + ', ' + JSON.stringify({
  headers: {
    'Cookie': ck
  }
}))

bid = getBookIdFull(book_shelf_info)
let id_list = splitArray(bid, 100)
let urls = []
id_list.forEach(i => {
    urls.push(xGorgon("multi-detail", "book_id=" + i.join(","), null, ck))
})

res = java.ajaxAll(urls)

let resp = {book_info: []}
res.forEach(r => {
  resp.book_info = resp.book_info.concat(JSON.parse(r.body()).data)
})

return resp
}

function getByGroupName(name) {
  let book_shelf_url = 'https://fanqienovel.com/reading/bookapi/bookshelf/info/v:version/?aid=1967&iid=0&version_code=57700&update_version_code=57700'

  let book_shelf_info = JSON.parse(java.ajax(book_shelf_url + ', ' + JSON.stringify({
    headers: {
      'Cookie': ck,
    }
  })))
  let group_bookids = {
    "未分组": []
  }
  // java.log(
  book_shelf_info.data.book_shelf_info.forEach(i => {
    if (!group_bookids[i.group_name ? i.group_name : "未分组"]) group_bookids[i.group_name] = []
    group_bookids[i.group_name ? i.group_name : "未分组"].push(i.book_id)
  })
  // java.log(JSON.stringify(group_bookids["未分组"]))
  // java.log(decodeURIComponent(name))
  if (!group_bookids[decodeURIComponent(name)]) return {data: []}
  //java.log("awa")
  let book_ids = splitArray(group_bookids[decodeURIComponent(name)], 100)
  let urls = []

  book_ids.forEach(i => {
    urls.push(xGorgon("multi-detail", "book_id=" + i.join(","), null, ck))
  })
  
  res = java.ajaxAll(urls)

  let resp = {book_info: []}
  res.forEach(r => {
    resp.book_info = resp.book_info.concat(JSON.parse(r.body()).data)
  })

  return resp
}

function getByTabIndex(index) {
  let url = xGorgon(
	  "bookmall/tab",
    "version_name=5.8.9.32&device_id=1024&device_type=114514&iid=2048",
	  null,
	  ck
  )
  let all = JSON.parse(java.ajax(url))
  let tab = all.data.tab_item[0].cell_data[index]
  // java.log(JSON.stringify(tab))
  tab = tab.cell_data
  if (!tab) tab = []
  let bookList = []
  for (let i of tab) {
    bookList = bookList.concat(i.book_data)
    // java.log(JSON.stringify(i.book_data))
  }
  return { book_info: bookList }
}

if (baseUrl.endsWith("bookshelf")) result = getShelf("bookshelf/info")
else {
  let w = baseUrl.split("/")
  if (baseUrl.includes("groupName")) {
    result = getByGroupName(w[w.length - 1])
  } else if (baseUrl.includes("tab")) {
    result = getByTabIndex(parseInt(w[w.length - 1]))
  } else result = JSON.parse(result)
}
JSON.stringify({data: result.book_info || result.data.book_info || result.detail_list || result.data})
</js>

searchUrl:
<js>
let variable = JSON.parse(source.getVariable());
const { source: { tab, mode: show }, apiIndex } = variable;

var again = false;
var keyStr = String(key);

var prefixMap = {
    "m:": { tab: 2, show: "🌄漫画" },
    "t:": { tab: 3, show: "💿听书" },
    "d:": { tab: 4, show: "📹短剧" }
};

var prefixes = ["m:", "t:", "d:"];
for (var i = 0; i < prefixes.length; i++) {
    var prefix = prefixes[i];
    if (keyStr.indexOf(prefix) === 0) {
        var config = prefixMap[prefix];
        tab = config.tab;
        show = config.show;
        key = keyStr.substring(2);
        variable.source.tab = config.tab;
        variable.source.mode = config.show;
        again = true;
        break;
    }
}

if (again) {
    source.setVariable(JSON.stringify(variable));
}

let prams = [
    `query=${key}`,
    `offset=${( page - 1) * 10}`,
    `tab=${tab}`
]

function Search(key, apiIndex, prams) {
	    let is_id = /^\d+$/.test(key);
	    if(!is_id) {
          let search = api[apiIndex] + action + "search.php?" + prams.join("&");
          return search
   } else {
        	  let book_url = api[apiIndex] + action + "detail.php?bookId=" + key;
   	       return book_url
   	}
 }
 
java.toast("\n当前来源：\n" + show);
java.put("mode", show);
Search(key, apiIndex, prams);
</js>

ruleBookInfo.lastChapter:
<js>
try{
	novelId = baseUrl.match(/(\d+)/)[1];
lastStr = java.ajax("https://android.jjwxc.net/androidapi/chapterList?novelId="+novelId+"&more=0&whole=1");

cache.put("有卷名src"+novelId, lastStr, 60)

last=JSON.parse(lastStr).chapterlist;



$=last[last.length-1];
vip= ($.isvip!=='0');
point=($.point=='0');
chapterMessage =/福利番外/.test($.chapterMessage);
vip = (point&&vip)?"":"🔒"
vip = chapterMessage?"🎁":vip;
chapterMessage =/限免/.test($.chapterMessage);
vip = chapterMessage?"🆓":vip;

chapterid=$.chapterid;
chaptername=$.chaptername;
date=$.chapterdate;
result = vip+chapterid+'.'+chaptername+'•'+date;

java.put("lastChapter",result)
}
catch(err){
result="请刷新或暂无目录"
}
</js>

ruleContent.content:
try{ const bbb = book.getVariable("custom"); const sss = source.getVariable(); if (/jjwxc|vipContent/.test(baseUrl)) { function decode(){ baseUrl = `https://app.jjwxc.org/androidapi/chapterContent?versionCode=381&${bDe(baseUrl)}`; //let date = "Mobile " + Date.now(); let response = java.get(baseUrl, {}); let content = String(response.body()); isPay = !/"content"/.test(content)&&!/"data":{}/.test(content); if(isPay){ let accesskey = String(response.header("accesskey")); let keyString = String(response.header("keystring")); let accesskeyLen = accesskey.length; let v6 = accesskey.charCodeAt(accesskeyLen - 1); let v9 = 0; for (var i = 0; i < accesskey.length; i++) { v9 += accesskey.charCodeAt(i); } let v15 = v9 % keyString.length; let v17 = Math.floor(v9 / 65); let v18 = keyString.length; let v43 = keyString.substring(v15, v17 + v15 > v18 ? v18 : v17 + v15);; let v32 = content.length; let [v38, dest] = (v6 & 1) !== 0 ? [content.slice(-12), content.slice(0, -12)] : [content.slice(0, 12), content.slice(12)]; let key = java.md5Encode(v43 + v38).slice(0, 8); let iv = java.md5Encode(v38).slice(0, 8); content = java.createSymmetricCrypto("DES/CBC/PKCS5Padding", key, iv).decryptStr(dest); } return content } let intro = String(java.get("intro1")).replace(/\s/g, ''); const hasContent = /"content"/.test(result); java.setContent(hasContent ? result : decode()); intro = intro ? `◎${intro}◎
` : ''; let content = String(java.getString("$..content")); let saybody = String((/关闭作话/.test(bbb) || /关闭作话/.test(sss))?"":java.getString("$..sayBody")); saybody = saybody.replace(/(?:.*(?:蟹蟹|扔了|感谢|投出|灌溉营养液|送的|谢谢).*?(?:手榴|月票|霸王票|小天使|火箭炮|深水鱼雷|浅水炸弹|地雷|营养液)([xX]\d+)*.*|非常感谢大家对我的支持，我会继续努力的！|.*?瓶[；~]|“.*?”(?:营养液|手榴弹|月票|霸王票|小天使|火箭炮|深水鱼雷|浅水炸弹|地雷)x\d+|读者.*?(月石|营养液).*|地雷感谢：[\s\S]+)/g,''); let say = /[\u4e00-\u9fa5]/.test(saybody) ? `\n【📢作者有话说】\n${saybody}` : ''; if (/token|vipContent/.test(baseUrl)) { const vipc = content.length > 30 ? java.createSymmetricCrypto("DES/CBC/PKCS5Padding", "KW8Dvm2N", "1ae2c94b").decryptStr(content) : `${/23110/.test(String(java.getString("$..message")))?"请使用安卓端的token":java.getString("$..message")}\n❗️登录后请先更新目录，再刷新正文`; result = intro + vipc + say; } else { result = intro + content + say; } } result; }catch(e){ java.log(e) } ##为营造更好的评论环境，近期网站要求发评须进行实名认证，未实名用户评论暂时仅在对应作者后台及发评用户后台可见.*|获取正文失败[\s\S]+|◎\s+?◎|◎undefined◎
ruleContent.replaceRegex:
<js>
c = chapter;
if(/^◎/.test(result) ){
	chapter = result.match(/◎([\s\S]+?)(…)*◎/)[1].replace(/\s/g,'').replace(/,/g,'，');
	chapter2=result.match(/◎[\s\S]+?◎([\s\S]+)/)[1].replace(/\s/g,'').replace(/,/g,'，');
	num = 4;	if(chapter.substring(0,num)==chapter2.substring(0,num)){
		result = result.replace(/◎[\s\S]+?◎\s*/,'')
	}else{result}
}else{result}

function removeDuplicatedParagraphs(text, chapterTitle) {
    var paragraphs = text.split('\n');
    var firstParagraph = paragraphs[0].trim();
    var containsSpecialChar = firstParagraph.includes('◎');
    var targetIndex = containsSpecialChar ? 1 : 0;
    var targetParagraph = paragraphs[targetIndex].trim();
    var lastChar = targetParagraph.charAt(targetParagraph.length - 1);
    var isPunctuation = /[——◎。！？，；：\?!,;:》 】）”’…~"'\)]/.test(lastChar);
    
    if (!isPunctuation) {
        for (var i = 0; i < chapterTitle.length - 1; i++) {
            var twoChars = chapterTitle.substring(i, i + 2);
            if (twoChars === '  ' || twoChars.includes('☪')) continue;
            
            if (targetParagraph.includes(twoChars)) {
                java.log("删除当前段落：" + targetParagraph);
                java.log("当前章节名：" + chapterTitle);
                java.log("相同连续文字：" + twoChars);
                paragraphs.splice(targetIndex, 1);
                break;
            }
        }
    }
    return paragraphs.join('\n');
}


let bbb = String(book.getVariable("custom"));
let sss = String(source.getVariable());
if(/净化/.test(sss)||/净化/.test(bbb))result = removeDuplicatedParagraphs(result, title);
result = result.replace(/<br\/>/g,'\n');

result
</js>

ruleExplore.bookList:
<js>
if(/incrementFavorite/.test(baseUrl)){
let order = Number(java.get("order"));
function sortBooks(data, order) {
  let sortedData = JSON.parse(data).addData;
  if (java.get("classid") == "0") {
    sortedData = sortedData.filter(book => book.classId === "0");
  }
  switch(order) {
    case 1: 
      sortedData.sort((a, b) => {   	
        return Date.parse(b.chapterdateNewest.replace(/ /,'T')) - Date.parse(a.chapterdateNewest.replace(/ /,'T'));
      });
      break;   
    case 2:
      sortedData.sort((a, b) => {
        return Number(b.favoriteDate) - Number(a.favoriteDate);
      });
      break;    
    case 3:
      sortedData.sort((a, b) => {
        return Number(b.novelbefavoritedcount) - Number(a.novelbefavoritedcount);
      });
      break;    
    case 4:   
      sortedData.sort((a, b) => {
        return Number(b.original_novelsize) - Number(a.original_novelsize);
      });
      break;    
    default:
      break;
  }
  return sortedData;
}
result = JSON.stringify(sortBooks(src,order))
	}
	
function transformNovelList(jsonData) {
    const data = typeof jsonData === 'string' ? JSON.parse(jsonData) : jsonData;
    Object.keys(data.novellist).forEach(categoryName => {
        data.novellist[categoryName].forEach(novel => {
            novel.cname = categoryName;
        });
    });
    
    return JSON.stringify(data)
}
if(/authorid=/.test(baseUrl))result=transformNovelList(result);

if(baseUrl.includes("favObservationByDate")){
	let nb = String(Map("nb")||"1,2,3,4,8,9");
	nb = nb.split(",");
	let list= JSON.parse(result).data.list;
	let l = [];
	list.forEach((x,i)=>{
		x.p = "第"+(i+1)+"名";
		let fz = x.fit_fenzhan;
		let r = fz.filter(v=>nb.includes(v));
		  if(r.length==2)l.push(x);
		});
		result = JSON.stringify(l);
	}
result
</js>

ruleToc.chapterList:
<js>
try{
baseUrl = bDe(baseUrl);
var novelId=getNid(baseUrl);
var token = Map("token");
let sss = String(source.getVariable())

if(/(加入|移入|移出).*?\d*/.test(sss)){
let url,sign,signbody,r;
if(/加入.*?\d+/.test(sss)){
url = "https://android.jjwxc.net/androidapi/addFavorite";
signbody = `${Date.now()}:${Map("token")}:${novelId}`;
sign = encodeURIComponent(encode(signbody));
 post = {
 	"method":"POST", 	"body":"versionCode=444&sign="+sign+"&classId="+sss.match(/加入.*?::(\d+)/)[1]
 	};
r = java.ajax(url+","+JSON.stringify(post));
r = JSON.parse(r)?.data?.list?.[0];
java.longToast((r?.message??"请登录")+"至【"+(r?.classname??"请登录")+"】");
};
if(/移出/.test(sss)){
	url = "https://android.jjwxc.net/androidapi/delFavorite";
	post = {
		"method":"POST",
		"body":`versionCode=444&token=${Map("token")}&novelId=${novelId}`
		}
	r = java.ajax(url+","+JSON.stringify(post));
r = JSON.parse(r)?.data?.list?.[0];
java.longToast(r?.message??"请登录");
	}
if(/移入.*?\d+/.test(sss)){
	url = "https://android.jjwxc.net/androidapi/changeNovelFavoriteClass";
	post = {
		"method":"POST",
		"body":`versionCode=444&token=${Map("token")}&novelIds=${novelId}&className=${sss.match(/移入(.*?)::/)[1]}&classId=${sss.match(/::(\d+)/)[1]}`
		}
r = java.ajax(url+","+JSON.stringify(post));
r = JSON.parse(r);
java.longToast(r?.message??"请登录");
	}

if(!/批量(?:加入|移出|移入).*\d*\s*/.test(sss)){source.setVariable(sss.replace(/(?:加入|移出|移入).*\d*\s*/,''));
}


}


var 有卷名src =!cache.get("有卷名src"+novelId)?java.ajax("https://android.jjwxc.net/androidapi/chapterList?novelId="+novelId+"&more=0&whole=1"):cache.get("有卷名src"+novelId);

有卷名src = JSON.parse(有卷名src);

var message = 有卷名src?.message;
if(/\d+_[\w\d]{16,}/.test(token)&&!/1058/.test(message)){
	
let 	tokenUrl =  "https://android.jjwxc.net/androidapi/chapterList?novelId="+novelId+"&more=0&whole=1&token="+token;
	
let tokenSrc = (!cache.get("tokenSrc"+novelId)||/登入验证失败/.test(cache.get("tokenSrc"+novelId)))?JSON.parse(java.ajax(tokenUrl)):JSON.parse(cache.get("tokenSrc"+novelId));


cache.delete("有卷名src"+novelId);


let lessData = tokenSrc.chapterlist;

let moreData = 有卷名src.chapterlist;
if(lessData!==undefined){
for(let item of lessData) {
    let match = moreData.find(moreItem => moreItem.chapterid === item.chapterid && moreItem.chaptertype === item.chaptertype);
    if(match) {
        Object.assign(match, item);
    }
}
}
JSON.stringify(moreData)
}else{
	result = JSON.stringify(有卷名src)
	}
}catch(e){
	java.log(e)
	}
</js>

<js>
let bbb = String(book.getVariable("custom"));
function readEncrypt(novelid,flag) {
	     token = Map("token");   
     	FORUMSIGNTAG = 1;
       READSIGNTAG = 0;
	      strArr = [token,novelid,"autosubscribe",flag];       
	      sb = new Date().getTime().toString();
         length = strArr.length;
        for ( i2 = READSIGNTAG; i2 < length; i2 += FORUMSIGNTAG) {
            str = strArr[i2];
            sb+=":";
            sb+=str;
        }   
     let option = {
	    	"method":"POST", 	"body":"versionCode=313&sign="+encode(sb)
	    	}
	    
url = "https://android.jjwxc.com/androidapi/autoSubscribe,"+JSON.stringify(option)

 java.longToast(JSON.parse(java.ajax(url)).message); book.putCustomVariable(bbb.replace(/(?:开启|关闭)购买\s*/,''));
    }
    
 if(/(开启|关闭)购买/.test(bbb)){
 	a = /关闭购买/.test(bbb)?"cancel":(/开启购买/.test(bbb)?"open":"cancel");
 	
 readEncrypt(result[0].novelid,a)
 	}
 	
result = result[0]=="1058"||result[0]=="1068"?JSON.stringify([{"chaptername":"暂无目录","chapterid":"","islock":"0"}]):result;
</js>

ruleToc.chapterName:
<js>
$=result;title=$.chaptername;title=String(title).replace(/^\s+/,'');intro=$.chapterintro;vip=$.isvip!='0';lock=$.islock!='0';type=$.chaptertype=='1'?true:false;num=!type?$.chapterid+"  ☪ ":'';
bbb = String(book.getVariable("custom"));
sss = String(source.getVariable());


if(/去章节序号/.test(bbb) || /去章节序号/.test(sss)){
num=''
}
if(/章节名/.test(bbb) || /章节名/.test(sss)){
num=!type?"第"+$.chapterid+"章 ":'';
}
title=type?'📖 '+title+' 📖':title;
if( (/目录简介/.test(bbb) || /目录简介/.test(sss))&&!/📖/.test(title)){
	fu = /目录简介【(.*?)】/.test(bbb)?bbb.match(/目录简介【(.*?)】/)[1]:sss.match(/目录简介【(.*?)】/)[1];
	title = title +(fu==="删除"?"":fu+intro)
	}else{
		java.put("intro1",intro);
		}
l=lock?'[此章节已锁]':'';
result=num+title+l;
</js>

if(chapterMessage||point){
	result=true
	}else{
		result=false
		}
</js>

variableComment:
源变量

填写【移出/加入/移入书架数据】 —— 这是用来操作晋江app的收藏的，如
移出尚未分类::0 会把当前书籍移出晋江的收藏
加入尚未分类::0,1,1 会加入收藏至晋江的尚未分类书架
移入尚未分类::0,0,2 会把已加入晋江收藏的书籍移入晋江的尚未分类书架。
书架数据：在登录页的【📚获取书架】获取，获取后将显示在源变量设置
刷新详情页生效之后会删除【移出/加入/移入书架数据】字样。
填写【批量移出/加入/移入书架数据】则不会自动删除这些字样，在阅读的书架刷新会批量操作，需要手动删除，避免重复请求。

其他源变量操作请在登录里查看【使用说明】

ruleToc.chapterList:
<js>
let free = source.getVariable() == "1"
let data = JSON.parse(result).data
let bid = baseUrl.match(/bookId=(\d+)/)[1]
let chapterList = []
data['vs'].forEach(list => {
  chapterList.push({
    name: String(list.vN),
    voltype: true
  })
  list['cs'].forEach(chapter => {
    let isVip = chapter.sS!="1" && !free ? "🔒":""
    let href = `https://vipreader.qidian.com/chapter/${bid}/${chapter.id}/`
    let url = list.hS == true || free ? `${href},{'webView': true}` : href
    chapterList.push({
      name: String(isVip+chapter.cN).trim().replace(/^(\d+)(?![\s\d卷部章节回.])/, '$1 ').replace(/\s+/g, " "),
      url: url,
      info: `更新时间: ${chapter.uT} 字数: ${chapter.cnt}`,
      voltype: false
    })
  })
})
chapterList
</js>

bookSourceComment: 获取目录有问题，提示Cloudflare认证，但无法认证

测试ai，我历劫了。

2026-03-16 by 天天的鸟蛋蛋（蛋蛋）by 书源驯兽师 AI（虾捣蛋）完成

知识点:
- 基于真实 HTML 源码分析
- 目录链接：.list a@href (详情页获取目录页链接)
- 目录列表：#list li (id 选择器)
- 正文规则：.con@html (class 选择器)
- 作者规则：p a[href*='/zuozhe/']@text
- 封面规则：img.0@src (第一个图片)
- 使用数字索引替代伪类选择器

真实结构验证:
- 搜索页：/i/sor.aspx?key={{key}}
- 搜索结果：.item
- 书名：.itemtxt h3 a@text
- 作者：.itemtxt p a@text
- 分类：.itemtxt p span.1@text
- 最新章节：.itemtxt ul li.0 a@text
- 封面：.item img@src
- 书籍链接：.item a.0@href
- 详情页：h1 书名，p a[href*='/zuozhe/'] 作者，img.0 封面，.list a@href 目录链接
- 目录：#list li → a@text, a@href，text.下一页@href 分页
- 正文：.con@html，text.下一页@href 下一章

版本信息:
- 技能包版本：v21.0 回退 v17 目录链接版
- 创建时间：2026-03-16
- 状态：生产就绪
